data.body: 3b30 held-out GREEN: 3/3 oracle tests passed; standard-tier worker attempt_count=1. Defect-seeded mutation removed the language from the fallback reason and held-out test went RED, then implementation restored and full oracle re-passed. Refactoring litmus: tests assert only public values/calls, no source/private structure. Preflight GREEN: metrics unit 57 passed; make lint passed; make typecheck passed (370 source files); make test passed 7079, skipped 37, deselected 112 in 26m26s. Only corrective gate edit was removing an unused test import.
